overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character moves from a covered sidewalk under an overpass into a large open intersection dominated by a cylindrical rotating billboard tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked covered sidewalk, moving toward the intersection ahead

notable_agents.action: standing still near the railing, facing the street

entered.detail: large yellow elevated highway structure spanning across the top of the frame
orange safety railings separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane street
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting ambient neon lights
illuminated digital advertising screens visible in the distance beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive yellow overpass structure. Orange metal railings line the left side, separating the walkway from the wet street where sparse traffic passes by. A lone NPC stands near the railing ahead, and neon signs glow in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with rotating cylindrical billboard tower

events.description: exits covered walkway under overpass and enters open intersection with massive cylindrical building
camera tilts upward to look up at the tall cylindrical billboard tower dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the towering cylindrical structure with rotating advertisements

entered.detail: massive cylindrical building covered in multiple tiers of rotating digital advertisement screens
yellow illuminated sign reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP on the cylindrical tower
white illuminated directional sign with arrow pointing to NOKOTA
yellow zebra crossing lines painted on the wet asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a vast open intersection dominated by a massive cylindrical tower covered in rotating digital billboards. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the El Dorado Pawn Shop sign and surrounding skyscrapers while crossing the wet street marked with yellow crosswalk lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with traffic signals and crossing pedestrians

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection, headlights reflecting on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection toward the opposite sidewalk, navigating around traffic signals

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: street sign displaying SPEED LIMIT 40 mounted on a pole
tall black pole with illuminated traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
illuminated walk/don't walk signs attached to traffic poles

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open intersection, the character passes traffic light poles and speed limit signs while futuristic cars drive through the wet streets. The cylindrical billboard tower falls behind to the left as the character approaches the opposite sidewalk, with neon-lit buildings lining both sides of the wide downtown street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a vast, neon-drenched city intersection. It begins with the character walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive yellow overpass, passing orange metal railings and a lone NPC beside a rain-slicked street. As the character emerges from the shadow of the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera tilts upward to reveal a towering cylindrical billboard for the El Dorado Pawn Shop amidst soaring skyscrapers. The camera then tracks across the wet asphalt and yellow crosswalk lines, passing traffic poles and futuristic cars as the massive tower recedes into the background. Finally, the movement concludes as the character approaches the opposite sidewalk, flanked by the glowing facades of neon-lit buildings lining the downtown street.
